# pi-listen — Full Context for LLMs

> Complete documentation for AI assistants working with the pi-listen codebase.

## Package Identity

- **Name:** @codexstar/pi-listen
- **npm:** https://www.npmjs.com/package/@codexstar/pi-listen
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/codexstar69/pi-listen
- **License:** MIT
- **Type:** Pi coding agent extension (pi-package)
- **Language:** TypeScript
- **STT Backend:** Deepgram Nova 3 (cloud, WebSocket streaming)

---

## What pi-listen Does

1. **Pre-recording:** Audio capture starts during the warmup countdown — the user never misses the first word.
2. **Hold-to-talk:** User holds SPACE → SoX streams audio to Deepgram → interim transcripts appear in editor in real time → release to finalize.
3. **Tail recording:** Recording continues 1.5s after release so the last word isn't clipped.
4. **Voice commands:** "hey pi, run tests", "undo", "submit" are executed as actions.
5. **Continuous dictation:** `/voice dictate` for long-form speaking without holding keys.
6. **Double-escape clear:** Two Escape presses within 500ms clears the editor.
7. **Zero-config start:** Auto-activates if `DEEPGRAM_API_KEY` is set. First-run hint with signup link if not.
8. **API validation:** `/voice test` validates SoX, mic capture, and Deepgram key against the live API.
9. **Reactive waveform:** Audio-level-driven animation with fast attack / slow decay smoothing.
10. **Cross-platform:** Kitty protocol + non-Kitty gap-based fallback. macOS, Windows, Linux.

---

## Architecture

```
Pi CLI (Node.js)
  └── extensions/voice.ts (~1950 lines)
        ├── extensions/voice/config.ts (~170 lines)
        ├── extensions/voice/onboarding.ts (~160 lines)
        ├── extensions/voice/deepgram.ts (~30 lines)
        └── extensions/voice/text-processing.ts (~100 lines)
        │
        │ WebSocket (streaming PCM audio)
        ▼
  Deepgram Nova 3 API (cloud STT)
```

### State Machine

```
idle → warmup → recording → finalizing → idle
           ↑         │
           └─────────┘  (rapid re-press recovery)
```

- **idle:** Waiting for space hold
- **warmup:** Space held, countdown shown, pre-recording active (audio already streaming to Deepgram)
- **recording:** Live transcripts updating editor, waveform animation
- **finalizing:** Tail recording (1.5s) + CloseStream sent, waiting for final transcript

### Hold Detection

**A) Kitty protocol** (Ghostty, Kitty, WezTerm, Windows Terminal 1.22+):
True key events. First press → warmup + pre-recording. Release → tail recording → stop.

**B) Non-Kitty** (macOS Terminal, older terminals):
Gap-based. Counts rapid presses to confirm hold (REPEAT_CONFIRM_COUNT=3). Gap = released.

---

## File Reference

| File | Lines | Purpose |
|------|-------|---------|
| `extensions/voice.ts` | ~1950 | Main: SoX recording, Deepgram WebSocket, pre-recording, tail recording, hold-to-talk state machine, voice commands, waveform widget, double-escape, first-run hint, `/voice` commands |
| `extensions/voice/config.ts` | ~170 | VoiceConfig type, load/save, schema migration, onboarding state |
| `extensions/voice/onboarding.ts` | ~160 | Setup wizard — Deepgram key entry, scope selection |
| `extensions/voice/deepgram.ts` | ~30 | WebSocket URL builder, API key resolver |
| `extensions/voice/text-processing.ts` | ~100 | Voice command detection, punctuation shortcuts |

---

## Key Constants

| Constant | Value | Purpose |
|----------|-------|---------|
| `HOLD_THRESHOLD_MS` | 800 | Min hold before recording activates |
| `TAIL_RECORDING_MS` | 1500 | Keep recording after space release |
| `RELEASE_DETECT_MS` | 500 | Gap that means "released" (non-Kitty) |
| `REPEAT_CONFIRM_COUNT` | 3 | Rapid presses to confirm hold |
| `RECORDING_GRACE_MS` | 600 | Ignore release right after recording starts |
| `MAX_RECORDING_SECS` | 120 | Auto-stop safety cap |

---

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/voice-setup` | Interactive setup wizard |
| `/voice test` | Full diagnostics — SoX, mic, API key validation |
| `/voice` | Toggle on/off |
| `/voice on` / `off` | Enable / disable |
| `/voice dictate` | Continuous dictation |
| `/voice stop` | Stop recording or dictation |
| `/voice info` | Config + status |
| `/voice history` | Recent transcriptions |

## Keybindings

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| `SPACE` (hold ≥800ms) | Record with pre-recording + tail recording |
| `Ctrl+Shift+V` | Toggle recording |
| `Escape` × 2 | Clear editor |

## Voice Commands

| Trigger | Action |
|---------|--------|
| "hey pi, run tests" | Inserts `bun run test` |
| "hey pi, ..." | Sends message to agent |
| "undo" | Removes last word |
| "clear" | Clears editor |
| "submit" / "send it" | Submits |
| "new line" / "period" / "comma" | Inserts character |

---

## Configuration

```typescript
interface VoiceConfig {
  version: 2;
  enabled: boolean;
  language: string;
  scope: "global" | "project";
  deepgramApiKey?: string;
  onboarding: {
    completed: boolean;
    schemaVersion: number;
    completedAt?: string;
    source?: "first-run" | "setup-command" | "migration";
    skippedAt?: string;
  };
}
```

---

## Setup

```bash
command pi install npm:@codexstar/pi-listen   # Install extension
brew install sox                               # Microphone capture
export DEEPGRAM_API_KEY="your-key"            # https://dpgr.am/pi-voice
```

## Development

```bash
bun install && bun run typecheck && bun run test
```
